channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Meta cutting several hundred jobs amid record AI spending: Sources
item.description: [Straits Times] The layoffs will affect employees both in the US and other international markets.

item.title: 【钛晨报】加快建立长期护理保险制度，中办、国办最新部署；拼多多官宣“新拼姆”方案：开启品牌自营，一期已注资150亿；SpaceX计划最早于本周提交IPO申请筹集超过750亿美元资金
item.description: [钛媒体] 快手程一笑：截至26年1月可灵AI ARR已超3亿美元，预计今年收入翻倍以上增长；中国东航：拟购101架A320NEO系列飞机，约为1088.93亿元；特斯拉机器人最新视频曝光，马斯克称有望在2027年实现量产；国务院国资委：推动中央企业财务数智化转型升级；国家发改委发布2026年规章制定工作计划；工信部公开征求《人工智能 安全治理 模型上下文协议应用安全要求》等121项行业标准计划项目意见；中上协：截至2月底全市场总市值再创历史新高突破116.8万亿，同比增长34%；中基协：2月底公募基金资产净值合计38.61万亿元；工信部：截至2月末5G移动电话用户达12.35亿户，比上年末净增3044万

item.title: The AI skills gap is here, says AI company, and power users are pulling ahead
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Anthropic finds AI isn’t replacing jobs yet, but early data shows growing inequality as experienced users gain an edge, raising concerns about future displacement and workforce divides.

item.title: Oil prices slip, stocks rally as Washington, Tehran bicker over talks
item.description: [CNA Tech] Oil prices fell and global stocks rose as analyst Jack Ablin said investors were "really just latching on to any promising news right now."

item.title: Meta is laying off hundreds of employees as it pours money into AI
item.description: [The Verge AI] Meta is laying off hundreds of employees across its company, according to reports from The New York Times, NBC News, and The Information. The job cuts impact workers on Meta's recruiting, social media, and sales teams, along with Reality Labs, the division that develops the company's smart glasses a

item.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab experiment for now.

item.title: Explainer-What comes next after the social media trial verdicts?
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Travel tech firm Navan sees strong 2027 revenue on demand from new customers
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Disney’s big bets on the metaverse and AI slop aren’t going so well
item.description: [The Verge AI] Less than a week into his tenure as Disney's newly-appointed CEO, Josh D'Amaro is already dealing with two separate crises that have cast a shadow over the company's future plans. OpenAI is shutting down its Sora image-generation program just months after Disney announced a $1 billion dollar collabo

item.title: Melania Trump wants a robot to homeschool your child
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] The first lady sees AI and robotics playing a prominent role in the future of American education.

item.title: There’s Something Very Dark About a Lot of Those Viral AI Fruit Videos
item.description: [WIRED AI] With female AI fruit being fart-shamed and even sexually assaulted, there’s a misogynistic undercurrent to the fruit slop microdramas, even as they appear to be cultivating genuine fans.

item.title: Can you monitor a situation without monitors? The Polymarket sports bar tried
item.description: [The Verge AI] Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge readers who are political junkies, and Washington insiders hooked on technology. If this email has been forwarded to you but you're not a subscriber, sign up here so you can get that pure, uncut Regulator every Wednesday, straight from the sourc

item.title: OpenClaw Agents Can Be Guilt-Tripped Into Self-Sabotage
item.description: [WIRED AI] In a controlled experiment, OpenClaw agents proved prone to panic and vulnerable to manipulation. They even disabled their own functionality when gaslit by humans.

item.title: Apple brings in age checks for UK iPhone users
item.description: [BBC Technology] Customers who do not confirm how old they are or are underage will have web content filters turned on automatically.

item.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC propose a ban on data center construction
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduced companion legislation to halt construction on new data centers until Congress passes comprehensive AI regulation.

item.title: Google launches Lyria 3 Pro music generation model
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Google is launching Lyria 3 Pro, an upgraded music model that generates longer, more customizable tracks, as it expands AI music tools across Gemini, enterprise products, and other services.

item.title: Reddit takes on the bots with new ‘human verification’ requirements for fishy behavior
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Reddit will require suspected automated accounts to verify they’re human, as it ramps up efforts to curb bot-driven spam and manipulation.

item.title: Reddit accounts with ‘fishy’ bot-like behavior will soon need to prove they’re human
item.description: [The Verge AI] Reddit is taking new steps to identify bots on the platform - a process that may require some users to confirm that they're human. In a post on Wednesday, Reddit CEO Steve Huffman writes that the company will introduce a labeling system for accounts registered as bots, and ask users with "automated"

item.title: Google Lyria 3 Pro makes longer AI songs
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google is expanding the capabilities of its Lyria 3 music-making AI, enabling it to create tracks up to three minutes long and from within multiple other Google Products. Until now, Lyria had been limited to 30-second clips. Lyria 3 Pro not only increases the maximum length sixfold, it also allows t

item.title: Senate Democrats are trying to ‘codify’ Anthropic’s red lines on autonomous weapons and mass surveillance
item.description: [The Verge AI] Anthropic's fight with the Pentagon is expanding to Congress. Sen. Adam Schiff (D-CA) is working on a new bill to "codify" Anthropic's red lines and ensure humans make the ultimate decisions in questions of life and death, and Sen. Elissa Slotkin (D-MI) recently introduced a bill to limit the Defens

item.title: OpenAI Enters Its Focus Era by Killing Sora
item.description: [WIRED AI] As the ChatGPT-maker eyes an IPO, it's ditching Sora in favor of a unified AI assistant and enterprise coding tools.

item.title: Legal software firm Harvey valued at $11 billion in latest funding round
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Long-game strategy crucial as new initiatives help S’pore start-ups go overseas, be competitive
item.description: [Straits Times] Attracting founders and quality talent in key sectors like AI and deep tech remains a top priority.

item.title: Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know
item.description: [MarTech] We've updated our page on Agentforce with details on Intent-Aware Search in Agentforce for Commerce. The post Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: New Bernie Sanders AI Safety Bill Would Halt Data Center Construction
item.description: [WIRED AI] The US senator said on Tuesday that a moratorium would give lawmakers time to "ensure that AI is safe." Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will introduce a similar bill in the House in the weeks ahead.

item.title: Practical Playbooks for Putting AI into Action at IBM and Schneider Electric in China
item.description: [钛媒体] As AI enters the stage of industrial integration, a profound industrial transformation is accelerating around the world. From the continual iteration of large models to the emergence of agents, AI is evolving from a technology into a core force driving corporate growth and reshaping the industrial o

item.title: 光象科技半年融资超 1 亿元， IDG资本领投天使轮｜融资速递
item.description: [钛媒体] 本轮融资资金将主要用于具身机器人的核心技术研发、产品化推进及商业化交付工作。

item.title: Trump to name Zuckerberg, Ellison, Huang to tech panel, WSJ reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: SLB expands Nvidia partnership to develop AI infrastructure for energy sector
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: 氪星晚报｜拼多多官宣“新拼姆”方案：开启品牌自营，一期已注资；阿里获评全球最具创新力AI企业，是唯一入选的亚洲公司；三星加入韩国政府倡导的车辆轮换限行计划，以应对能源短缺
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 斯里兰卡国家支付网络LankaPay宣布：40万商户已支持微信支付 36氪获悉，3月24日，斯里兰卡国家支付网络LankaPay宣布正式接入微信支付。即日起，中国游客可在斯里兰卡全岛超过40万家支持LANKAQR二维码的商户中，直接使用微信支付进行消费。目前，微信跨境支付已覆盖全球78个国家和地区，支持36种货币，覆盖餐饮、百货、商超便利、交通出行、景点购票、留学缴费等丰富场景。 拼多多官宣“新拼姆”方案：开启品牌自营，一期已注资150亿 36氪获悉，3月25日，拼多多集团正式宣布组建“新拼姆”，未来三年投入1000亿元现金，开启品牌自营，继续重仓中国供应链，带动国内

item.title: 5倍AI应用牛股易点天下增收不增利，赴港IPO前实控人携创业伙伴套现4.45亿 | 看财报
item.description: [钛媒体] Q4亏损4547万元。

item.title: 中国通用大模型十强争霸：谁配得上“第一”这个称号？
item.description: [钛媒体] 这份排名是对2026年3月这个瞬间的定格，而非对未来的预言。

item.title: AI客服的善恶生意经：一边是人工智障，一边是暴力催收
item.description: [钛媒体] “技术作恶”在智能客服领域发挥的尤为淋漓尽致。

item.title: Singapore stocks extend rally, tracking regional gains; STI up 0.9%
item.description: [Straits Times] Across the broader market, gainers beat losers 386 to 185.

item.title: 生产速度提升四倍，推出桌面级金属3D打印机，「融速科技」完成近亿元A轮融资 | 36氪首发
item.description: [36氪] 文 | 张冰冰 编辑 | 阿至 36氪获悉，苏州融速智造科技有限公司（以下简称「融速科技」）宣布完成近亿元A轮融资，投资方为河南豫资集团、苏高新融享基金。资金将用于进一步优化产品技术及产线建设，根据市场需求提升交付能力和生产规模。 「融速科技」成立于2020年，创始人徐方达为英国巴斯大学博士后，主要从事大尺寸增材方向研究。「融速科技」聚焦新一代DED送丝3D打印技术，面向航空航天、钢铁冶金、石油化工等工业领域中大尺寸零件制造需求，提供打印、装备、器件三大类型服务，其中STAR系列产品已获得来自中航、中车、中船等头部企业订单。 近期，「融速

item.title: Arm’s CEO Insists the Market Needs His New CPU. It Could Piss Everyone Off
item.description: [WIRED AI] Arm just confirmed the rumors: It’s producing its own chip for the first time. CEO Rene Haas explains why this won’t alienate the many chipmakers who license the company’s designs.

item.title: China bars Manus co-founders from leaving country amid Meta deal review: FT
item.description: [Business Times] The case highlights Beijing’s broader concerns about the loss of valuable technology to a geopolitical rival

item.title: Vol1.人才留言板｜第一期：这20家AI明星公司正在等你
item.description:
[36氪] 图源:36kr 每周精选30+优质岗位，覆盖AI、硬科技等领域，帮你找到下一个职业爆发点。 本期合作企业：红杉中国、高瓴、鼎晖、经纬被投企业｜B轮及以上占比65%。
卷首语 我们见过太多这样的场景：一家硬科技公司融完B轮，创始人却在朋友圈悄悄挂出招聘启事；一个专注大模型的算法专家，翻遍猎头推荐却找不到真正懂技术的团队。 这不是供需错配，而是信息失真。 过去十年，36氪记录了数千家公司的成长轨迹。我们看过他们最早的BP，见证他们一轮轮融资，知道哪家公司的技术栈真正扎实，哪个创始团队对人才有足够耐心。这些认知，不该只留在报道里。 所以有了“人才留言板”。

item.title: New partnerships, facilities by JTC to bolster startups at LaunchPad @ one-north
item.description: [Business Times] This includes a new co-working and event space for networking, investor meetings and community events

item.title: 从互连工程到生态协同：TE Connectivity在机器人产业链的双重角色
item.description: [36氪] 3月20日，TE Connectivity（简称 “TE” ）在苏州举办了 “机器人核心技术赋能智能工厂创新大会” 。活动通过技术交流与工厂参观等形式，邀请机器人产业链上下游企业与生态圈伙伴围绕核心技术与落地问题展开讨论，搭建起面向产业的交流与对接平台。与会讨论折射出一个共同背景：机器人正从技术验证加速走向工程化与规模化落地。 今年，政府工作报告连续第三年提出“人工智能+”，并首次提出“打造智能经济新形态”，推动重点行业领域加速商业化和规模化应用，同时将具身智能列入未来产业布局。在政策与应用场景共同推动下，机器人产业关注点也从“功能实现”转向“真实工况下的稳定运行与可复制交付”。 随着

item.title: OpenAI closes Sora video-making app and cancels $1bn Disney deal
item.description: [BBC Technology] The move comes less two years after the launch of the AI video app sent shockwaves through the media industry.

item.title: 瑞识科技实现二维可寻址VCSEL芯片量产，已落地车载激光雷达与智能机器人｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 作者｜乔钰杰 编辑｜袁斯来 据悉，国内化合物半导体厂商深圳瑞识智能科技有限公司（下称“瑞识科技”）近期实现二维可寻址VCSEL（垂直腔面发射激光器）芯片的大规模量产。该类产品此前长期受制于良率、成本及可靠性等问题，产业化进展缓慢，瑞识科技的量产落地，意味着这一技术路线开始进入实际应用阶段。 作为光芯片领域的重要分支，VCSEL芯片被广泛应用于3D传感、面部识别以及激光雷达测距与成像等场景。相较于传统边发射激光器，其在功耗、调制速度以及阵列化集成方面具备优势，更适配需要大规模光阵输出的感知系统，能够以更高效率支撑复杂环境下的精准探测。 自2017年前后消费电子引入结构光方案以来，

item.title: 拓竹和泡泡玛特和解，免费打印大牌IP的日子正在倒计时
item.description: [36氪] 作者 | 张子怡 编辑 | 袁斯来 在野蛮增长几年后，3D打印赛道玩家们一直没有直面的“灰犀牛”，终于冲入大门。 3月中旬，3D打印企业拓竹科技（Bambu Lab）发布声明，就旗下MakerWorld平台存在的IP侵权问题向潮玩巨头泡泡玛特致歉，双方达成和解，相关未经授权的LABUBU等模型被全面下架。 这场原定于4月对簿公堂的诉讼以“闪电和解”告终，不过，它为整个消费级3D打印行业敲响的版权警钟，才刚开始回荡。 这并非拓竹第一次面对侵权纠纷。罗小黑工作室（公司名：北京寒木春华动画技术有限公司）曾于2025年底向拓竹科技发起诉讼，案

item.title: Retail traders are selling stocks for the first time since 2023
item.description: [Straits Times] They dumped US$20.6 million worth of shares on March 23.

item.title: A tiny bank runs dry of borrowers as population shrinks in Japan
item.description: [Straits Times] Wakkanai Shinkin Bank in north Hokkaido has seen the number of residents halve from its 1964 peak.

item.title: Arm Holdings to sell its own chips, eyeing sales goal of $19.2 billion
item.description: [Straits Times] Under CEO Rene Haas, Arm has taken a greater role in the data centre market.

item.title: Meta told to pay $375m for misleading users over child safety
item.description: [BBC Technology] The owner of Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp has been found liable by a court in New Mexico.

item.title: Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers
item.description: [BBC Technology] The government will interview the young people and their parents before and after they try the limits to assess their impact.

item.title: Pentagon’s ‘Attempt to Cripple’ Anthropic Is Troubling, Judge Says
item.description: [WIRED AI] During a hearing Tuesday, a district court judge questioned the Department of Defense’s motivations for labeling the Claude AI developer a supply-chain risk.

item.title: Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems
item.description: [MarTech] Zeta is betting that tighter integration of data and AI will reduce the gap between insight and action. The post Athena signals Zeta’s push into AI-driven marketing systems appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why AI personalization comes with strict limits
item.description: [MarTech] Consumers are more willing to trade data for better recommendations, but they are very clear about what the red lines are. The post Why AI personalization comes with strict limits appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Why performance marketing stops working
item.description: [MarTech] Most brands optimize conversion while neglecting demand. Here’s what happens when the pipeline runs dry and how to fix it. The post Why performance marketing stops working appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Business Times] The software, called ClawBot, will appear as a contact within China’s most popular app

item.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
item.description: [BBC Technology] Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

item.title: Will AI end SEO?
item.description: [MarTech] From prompt engineering to data quality, SEO still depends on human input — even with AI's expanding capabilities. The post Will AI end SEO? appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How to prove ROI from AI workflow integration in B2B marketing
item.description: [MarTech] Embedding AI into marketing workflows promises big efficiency and performance gains — but you’ll need the right ROI models to justify the investment. The post How to prove ROI from AI workflow integration in B2B marketing appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
item.description: [BBC Technology] The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

item.title: Unitree plans 4.2 billion yuan Shanghai IPO, testing interest in humanoid robots
item.description: [Business Times] IPO is one of China’s biggest domestic tech listings in years

item.title: How a Vietnamese beauty startup landed a US$38 million exit
item.description: [Business Times] The Skinetiq deal with Marico marks a rare startup exit in Vietnam
